example: Poverty leads some people to commit crimes.
People who break the law should be punished.
The government should punish those who commit crimes.

word: send to prison / a rehabilitation center
vietnamese: đưa vào tù / trung tâm cải tạo
example: Criminals can be sent to a rehabilitation center to learn.

word: parents should spend more time with children
vietnamese: cha mẹ nên dành thời gian cho con
example: Parents should spend more time with children to guide them.

vietnamese: tiếp cận trò chơi bạo lực
example: Children easily get access to violent games on the internet.

word: copy bad things from the internet
vietnamese: bắt chước điều xấu trên mạng
example: Young people may copy bad things they see online.
Education and good parenting can help prevent crime.
Criminals can get vocational training to find a job later.
Poverty is one of the main causes of crime in society.
Games often contain a great deal of violence.
Criminals should learn how to behave well in society.
Parents should control their children's behaviors.
